ddt:Target.Name: A_IVI2_PI7_v0.9
ddt:Target.Description:
December 11, 2019 1st realease NB: Auto-ident will be updated
Release date: 09 April 2020 version : A_IVI2_PI5_PI6.1_V0.5 compliant: PI5 Sprint 1 to PI6 Sprint1
Release date: 15 May 2020 version : A_IVI2_PI6.2_v0.6 compliant: PI6 Sprint2 Diag spec version: v2.1.1
Release date: 11 June 2020 version : A_IVI2_PI6.2_v0.7 compliant: PI6 Sprint2 implementation made as per JIRA ticket CCSEXT-20484 (Diag spec version: v2.1.1)
date 28th jyly 2020 RVC configuration parameter offset value added speaker test io control screen added description modified for Horizontal_sync_“L”_pulse_width -> Horizontal_sync_L_pulse_width (name + mnemonic + description Phase_difference_VSYNC_–_HSYNC -> Phase_difference_VSYNC_HSYNC ? Vertical_sync_“L”_pulse_width -> Vertical_sync_L_pulse_width
date 06th SEP 2020 PI7 sprint3 compliant with Diag resource version v2.4

Data.Name: Number of CD inserted in radio
VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Wifi is off or in hotspot mode

Data.Name: Routinestatus
Data.Comment: Read the status of the routine

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: Routine Result
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Item.Text: Input values are not well formed(400)
An error occurred on the server. Please retry later.(500)

Data.Name: SWRC_rotary."7"DownToUp
Data.Comment: key status "7" down to up" rotary

Item.Text: Rotary switch turned Down to Up

Data.Name: SWRC_rotary."7"UpToDown
Data.Comment: key status "7" up to down rotary

Item.Text: Rotary switch turned Up to Down
Wifi is in hotspot mode without internet sharing
Wifi is in hotspot mode with internet sharing
Radio is in state Off user
Radio is in state On user
fail to establish one way TLS connection with Avnext master
fail to establish mutual authentication TLS connection with Avnext master
fail to establish mutual authentication TLS connection with Avnext region

Data.Name: Reset of Ethernet 100BASE-T1 PHY.Number of 100BASE-T1 interfaces
Reset of Ethernet 100BASE-T1 PHY.Interface1Port1 Reset of 100BASE-T1 PHY
Reset of Ethernet 100BASE-T1 PHY.Interface2Port2 Reset of 100BASE-T1 PHY
Reset of Ethernet 100BASE-T1 PHY.Interface3Port3 Reset of 100BASE-T1 PHY
MAC Addresses of the ECU.Number of Ethernet controllers in the ECU
Data.Comment: Number of Ethernet controllers in the ECU

Data.Name: MAC Addresses of the ECU.MAC Address1
MAC Addresses of the ECU.MAC Address2
ANT1.current level Field strength on antenna 1
ANT1.current Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna1 Frequency Tune $xxxx [KHz], 1KHz step if AM ex : 585 KHz -> $20 20 35 38 35

Data.Name: ANT2.current level Field strength on antenna 2
ANT2.current Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna2 Frequency value $xxxx, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM ex : 100.3 MHz -> $20 31 30 30 33

Data.Name: Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Number of 100BASE-T1 interfaces
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort1 Master/Slave status
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort1 Link status
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort1 SQI current value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Interface1Port1 Channel Diagnostic
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort1 SQI worst value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Interface2Port2 SQI current value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Interface2Port2 SQI worst value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Interface2Port2 Channel Diagnostic
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort3 Master/Slave status
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort3 Link status
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort3 SQI current value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.InterfacePort3 SQI worst value
Ethernet 100BASE-T1 Physical Layer Diagnostic.Interface3Port3 Channel Diagnostic

Item.Text: verified configuration for use in customer vehicle
input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

DataItem.Name: ANT1.current level Field strength on antenna 1
ANT2.current level Field strength on antenna 2

Request.Name: Routine Result.ADD_REMOVE A SHELTERED CONFIGURATION PARAMETER

Test.Description: V-CAN Bus Off condition/V-CAN Mute condition/BCM Absent condition/X Absent condition
M-CAN Bus Off Condition/M-CAN Connection error Condition/M-CAN Mute Detection

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
Note : If you as a user, are confronted to some difficulties with the database, or have ideas to improve it, please send this info to this address: Sheela.Hariharan@rntbci.com

Display.DataName: ANT2.current level Field strength on antenna 2
ANT1.current level Field strength on antenna 1

Label.Text: When requested by diag tool, The requested time will be set in A-IVI2

When a sound is requested, ECU must: 1. Mute all sources. 2. Issue the requested sound. 3. Activate microphon.4. Return to normal state. services will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available

When requested by diag tool, Self diagnosis status should be returned. This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When the routine is launched the A-IVI must restart the part authentication service as described in document F-D51-02_A-IVI_Part_Authentication_STR_COMP
When the routine is launched the A-IVI2 must reset the FOTA service. It means: - Reset AIVI FOTA State Machines incl SWMC to ensure to restart from an Idle state. - Erase FOTA buffer
When the start request is sent this routine should activate the extended debug menu (RDTM menu), and deactivate it by sending the stop request. Conditions: Security access status is "Unlock"
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.

This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0, before activating this service please make sure that RVC camera is configured as fitted
3. To store the new configuration of Rear camera settings do copy the content of Read Camera system tuned by I/O and paste it in the write tab of Camera_Systems!!!
The write screen is under construction/development

Button.Text: Read Camera system tuned by I/O

Label.Text: By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
By using this request, ECU should be able to perform a specific test in order to detect whether each speaker is correctly connected or not.
The IO control is temporary. The IO control lasts around 10 seconds and cannot be stop before completion.
Number of received frames with CRC error
It is not possible to screen clearly within DDT which port is UDP port, and which port is TCP port
In order to differenciate TCP and UDP ports, you have to use the TCP and UDP counters
TCP ports are screened first, followed by UDP ports
Example: If TCP port counter indicates 3 and UDP port counter indicates 2, the first 3 ports are TCP, the 2 last ports are UDP
